ddls:
CREATE TABLE "ontologies" (
  "ontology_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ontology */,
  "ontology_name" TEXT /* Name of the ontology (e.g., Gene Ontology) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ontology */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the ontology */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the ontology was updated */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL to the source of the ontology */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ontology_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "terms" (
  "term_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each term */,
  "ontology_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ontology the term belongs to */,
  "term_name" TEXT /* Name of the term */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the term */,
  "is_obsolete" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the term is obsolete */,
  "replaced_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the term that replaces it if the term is obsolete */,
  "synonyms" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of synonyms for the term */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("term_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_terms_ontology_id FOREIGN KEY ("ontology_id") REFERENCES ontologies ("ontology_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "biological_processes" (
  "process_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each biological process */,
  "term_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the term that describes the process */,
  "process_name" TEXT /* Name of the biological process */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the biological process */,
  "process_type" TEXT /* Type of biological process (e.g., signaling, metabolic) */,
  "pathway_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pathway the process is part of */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("process_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_biological_processes_term_id FOREIGN KEY ("term_id") REFERENCES terms ("term_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gene */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* Chromosome where the gene is located */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Start position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* End position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "strand" TEXT /* Strand of the gene (positive or negative) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_expression" (
  "expression_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expression profile */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the gene being expressed */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the condition under which the gene is expressed */,
  "expression_value" REAL /* Value of the gene expression */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment under which the expression was measured */,
  "normalized_value" REAL /* Normalized value of the gene expression */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expression_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_expression_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the condition */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the disease associated with the condition */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the condition (e.g., mild, moderate, severe) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pathways" (
  "pathway_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pathway */,
  "term_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the term that describes the pathway */,
  "pathway_name" TEXT /* Name of the biological pathway */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the biological pathway */,
  "pathway_type" TEXT /* Type of pathway (e.g., signaling, metabolic) */,
  "regulator_genes" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of regulator genes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pathway_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pathways_term_id FOREIGN KEY ("term_id") REFERENCES terms ("term_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "literature" (
  "citation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each citation */,
  "term_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the term being cited */,
  "citation_text" TEXT /* Text of the citation */,
  "citation_source" TEXT /* Source of the citation */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Name of the journal where the citation was published */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier of the citation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("citation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_literature_term_id FOREIGN KEY ("term_id") REFERENCES terms ("term_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user (e.g., institution, company) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrichment" (
  "enrichment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrichment result */,
  "process_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the biological process being enriched */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the condition under which enrichment was analyzed */,
  "enrichment_score" REAL /* Score of enrichment */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used for enrichment analysis */,
  "p_value" REAL /* P-value of the enrichment */,
  "q_value" REAL /* Q-value of the enrichment (False Discovery Rate) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrichment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrichment_process_id FOREIGN KEY ("process_id") REFERENCES biological_processes ("process_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrichment_terms" (
  "enrichment_term_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrichment term */,
  "enrichment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the enrichment result */,
  "term_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the term being enriched */,
  "enrichment_score" REAL /* Score of enrichment */,
  "evidence_code" TEXT /* Evidence code supporting the enrichment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrichment_term_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrichment_terms_enrichment_id FOREIGN KEY ("enrichment_id") REFERENCES enrichment ("enrichment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_ontology" (
  "gene_ontology_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene ontology relationship */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the gene being annotated */,
  "term_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the term annotating the gene */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., regulates, is_a) */,
  "evidence_code" TEXT /* Evidence code supporting the gene ontology relationship */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the gene ontology relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_ontology_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_ontology_term_id FOREIGN KEY ("term_id") REFERENCES terms ("term_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_ontology_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "literature_citations" (
  "citation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each citation */,
  "gene_ontology_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the gene ontology relationship being cited */,
  "citation_text" TEXT /* Text of the citation */,
  "citation_source" TEXT /* Source of the citation */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication of the citation */,
  "page_numbers" TEXT /* Page numbers of the citation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("citation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_literature_citations_gene_ontology_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_ontology_id") REFERENCES gene_ontology ("gene_ontology_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pathway_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pathway member */,
  "pathway_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pathway the member belongs to */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the gene being a member */,
  "member_role" TEXT /* Role of the member in the pathway (e.g., catalyst, regulator) */,
  "evidence_code" TEXT /* Evidence code supporting the membership in the pathway */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the pathway membership information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pathway_members_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pathway_members_pathway_id FOREIGN KEY ("pathway_id") REFERENCES pathways ("pathway_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pathway_citations" (
  "citation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each citation */,
  "pathway_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pathway being cited */,
  "citation_text" TEXT /* Text of the citation */,
  "citation_source" TEXT /* Source of the citation */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication of the citation */,
  "page_numbers" TEXT /* Page numbers of the citation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("citation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pathway_citations_pathway_id FOREIGN KEY ("pathway_id") REFERENCES pathways ("pathway_id")
)
